policy: A decision authorizes only its exact normalized sourcePath and category. Unknown rights remain excluded or pending review.

decisions.reason: Each template requires an exact per-resource decision.
Host-only OpenDesign uses Craft system typography; bundled OpenDesign fonts are removed by the staging gate.
Host-only OpenDesign uses Craft-owned module chrome; bundled OpenDesign brand, model and agent imagery is removed by the staging gate.
Plugins are outside the minimum profile.
Skills are outside the minimum profile.
Native outputs require exact license evidence and target ABI declarations.
Exact runtime path and ABI are verified. The packaged LICENSE is byte-identical to better-sqlite3@12.10.0 and the official source is https://github.com/WiseLibs/better-sqlite3/tree/v12.10.0.
Exact runtime path, ABI and packaged MIT notices are verified against node-pty@1.1.0; official source: https://github.com/microsoft/node-pty/tree/v1.1.0.
Exact Mach-O helper, target, executable mode and packaged MIT notices are verified against node-pty@1.1.0; official source: https://github.com/microsoft/node-pty/tree/v1.1.0.
Exact Node.js WASM runtime bytes and packaged LICENSE are verified against blake3-wasm@2.1.5; official source: https://github.com/connor4312/blake3/tree/v2.1.5.

Host-only OpenDesign uses unoptimized images and does not redistribute the Next.js sharp optimizer closure. The staging gate removes sharp and every @img sharp/colour package path; reintroduction requires a new exact rights decision.

Host-only OpenDesign does not redistribute sharp-libvips. The staging gate removes the complete sharp optimizer closure. legal/THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md retains the exact fallback audit; reintroduction requires complete notices, source/relinking evidence and a new reviewed decision.
